properties.subject: Welcome to %APP_NAME%
properties.message:
Hello %FIRST_NAME% %LAST_NAME%,

You have been invited to join %APP_NAME%. You can access the app from this link:

%LINK%

You are assigned to the role %ROLE_NAME% in this app.

If you didn’t ask to join the application or if you think this was a mistake, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,

%APP_NAME% team

properties.subject: Password Reset for %APP_NAME%
properties.message:
Hello %FIRST_NAME% %LAST_NAME%,

Follow this link to reset your %APP_NAME% password for your %EMAIL% account.

%LINK%

If you didn't ask to reset your password, you can ignore this email.

Thanks,

Your %APP_NAME% team
